rule.info: Detects scenarios where an windows defender exclusion was added in registry
where an entity would want to bypass antivirus scanning from windows defender
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_defender_bypass.yml
Detects disabling Windows Defender threat protection
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_defender_disabled.yml
Detects Windows Pcap driver installation based on a list of associated .sys files.
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_pcap_drivers.yml
This rule is designed to detect attempts to exploit Zerologon (CVE-2020-1472) vulnerability
using mimikatz zerologon module or other exploits from machine with "kali" hostname.
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_possible_zerologon_exploitation_using_wellknown_tools.yml
Detects PsExec service installation and execution events (service and Sysmon)
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_tool_psexec.yml
Detects suspicious WMI event filter and command line event consumer based on WMI and Security Logs.
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_wmi_persistence.yml
Windows Defender logs when the history of detected infections is deleted.
Log file will contain the message "Windows Defender Antivirus has removed history of malware and other potentially unwanted software".
rule.description: Windows Defender Malware Detection History Deletion
rule.info: https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_defender_history_delete.yml
Detects blocking of process creations originating from PSExec and WMI commands
rule.description: PSExec and WMI Process Creations Block
rule.info: https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_defender_psexec_wmi_asr.yml
Detects all actions taken by Windows Defender malware detection engines
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/1e029b98cf74a679bcd02e8f428c43252615bdb0/rules/windows/other/win_defender_threat.yml
